scores.rationale: The feedback misjudges the essay's mechanical quality and offers generic advice about adding external quotes instead of analyzing the provided text. It is also truncated, limiting its practical value.
Identical to Variant 1, this feedback provides vague suggestions about transitions and external sources while ignoring the essay's numerous spelling errors and repetitive structure.
This truncated template gives generic writing advice that does not address the specific analytical or mechanical issues present in the student's draft.
